narrative_beat: Podio com revista iluminada em biblioteca gotica em ruinas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an oak lectern at center holding an open unbranded magazine illuminated by a single golden beam descending from a cracked cathedral ceiling
subject.focal_point: the open magazine pages catching divine light
subject.secondary: Dusty leather-bound books on shelves flanking both sides. Low smoke creeping across marble floor.
props: open unbranded magazine with parchment pages
cracked cathedral ceiling with light beam

environment.location: a ruined Victorian reading room inside a crumbling Gothic library
environment.time_of_day: unknown interior, single shaft of golden light from above

composition.foreground: lectern and golden parchment in warm rich tones

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: sacred text as vessel of hidden truth

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
